query: SELECT COUNT(*) as zero_rows FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'boonphone' AND CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND is_bad_debt_row = 0
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as zero_rows FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'boonphone' AND CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0 AND is_bad_debt_row = 0
